note_text:
Patient: 50F presenting with macular degeneration.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy, beta-blockers was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with macular degeneration.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for anti-vegf injection.

Patient: 57F presenting with macular degeneration.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with macular degeneration.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for anti-vegf injection.

Patient: 52F presenting with macular degeneration.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for anti-vegf injection.

Patient: 72F presenting with significant cataract.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy, beta-blockers was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for cataract surgery.

Patient: 64M presenting with severe cataract.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for cataract surgery.

Patient: 77M presenting with cataract.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with cataract.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for cataract surgery.

Patient: 68M presenting with glaucoma.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy, NSAIDs was attempted over approximately 18 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with glaucoma.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for glaucoma surgery.

Patient: 78F presenting with glaucoma.
Conservative management including dietary and lifestyle modification was attempted over approximately 8 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with glaucoma.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for glaucoma surgery.

Patient: 74M presenting with glaucoma.
Conservative management including antiarrhythmic medication was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring ophthalmology physician requests authorization for glaucoma surgery.
